'''chachovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olaquindox|olaquindox]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olaquindox|olaquindox]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chachovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæcheveth|chæcheveth]] || [[word:chæchevej|chæchevej]] || [[word:chæchevesh|chæchevesh]] || [[word:chæcheve|chæcheve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachochovoth|chachochovoth]] || [[word:chachochovoj|chachochovoj]] || [[word:chachochovosh|chachochovosh]] || [[word:chachochovo|chachochovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachovoth|chachovoth]] || [[word:chachovoj|chachovoj]] || [[word:chachovosh|chachovosh]] || [[word:chachovo|chachovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachofvofth|chachofvofth]] || [[word:chachofvofj|chachofvofj]] || [[word:chachofvofsh|chachofvofsh]] || [[word:chachofvof|chachofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chachovotho|chachovotho]] || [[word:chachovojo|chachovojo]] || [[word:chachovosho|chachovosho]] || [[word:chachovoko|chachovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chachovoth|chachovoth]] || [[word:chachovoj|chachovoj]] || [[word:chachovosh|chachovosh]] || [[word:chachovo|chachovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chachovothol|chachovothol]] || [[word:chachovojol|chachovojol]] || [[word:chachovoshol|chachovoshol]] || [[word:chachovokol|chachovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chachovoothotho|chachovoothotho]] || [[word:chachovoojojo|chachovoojojo]] || [[word:chachovooshosho|chachovooshosho]] || [[word:chachovooko|chachovooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chachovothon|chachovothon]] || [[word:chachovojon|chachovojon]] || [[word:chachovoshon|chachovoshon]] || [[word:chachovokon|chachovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chachovothooro|chachovothooro]] || [[word:chachovojooro|chachovojooro]] || [[word:chachovoshooro|chachovoshooro]] || [[word:chachovokooro|chachovokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|c579b50}}
